reasoning:

The YFinance model predicts a 0.42 P(exceed) based on a moderate downward trend recently. Stock paths generally have slight positive drift, which usually supports going over 0.5 for long-term horizons, but the strong short-term momentum affects the first resolution date. Analysts are bullish on the name overall, keeping a target over $250.

For the August 24 resolution date (one week away), I am anchoring near 0.46. Downward momentum could easily drive it below the 224 threshold, but slight mean reversion might bump it up. The dividend dates are predicted to be early September (~Sep 5) which would reduce the price mechanically by ~0.825 on Ex-Date. Therefore, the September 16 resolution date would eat this mechanical drop. However, four weeks out gives more time to grow, so I'll put it at 0.48.

For November 15 (3 months out) and February 13, 2026 (6 months out), the positive drift of the stock has time to assert itself, overcoming the mechanical dip of one or two dividends. I therefore bring the probabilities closer to 0.50 and 0.51 respectively, matching a more typical random walk outcome combined with analyst optimism.
